so we can officially make the viral dot cake at home and it’s my new favorite little treat 🧁🌈 Ingredients: 1 box @Funfetti cake mix 3 eggs 1 cup water 1/2 cup oil funfetti vanilla frosting rainbow nonpareils sprinkles Instructions: In a large mixing bowl, mix cake mix, eggs, water, and oil until well combined and transfer to a greased square baking pan. Bake at 350° for 35-40 minutes, covering with foil halfway through. Allow to cool completely, then press greased ramekin into the center and twist to remove. Allow mini cake to slide out of ramekin and slice through the center to create 2 layers. Place bottom layer back in ramekin, top with a layer of frosting, then place top layer of cake with another layer of frosting spread evenly to the edges. Cover in rainbow nonpareils, allow to chill and slightly harden in the fridge, then take a center bite and enjoy! 😋 #cake #Recipe #baking #dessert #creatorsearchinsights

bakery style oreo stuffed cookies 🍪🥛    recipe: ingredients: ¾ cup salted butter, softened (170 g) ¾ cup packed brown sugar (150 g) ¼ cup granulated sugar (50 g) 1 large egg  1 tsp vanilla (5 g) 2 cups all-purpose flour (240 g) 1 tbsp cornstarch (8 g) ½ tsp baking soda (3 g) ¼ tsp salt (1.5 g) oreos, some whole some  roughly chopped  white chocolate (measure with your heart)  & choceur cookie and cream chocolate’s   instructions: cream the butter and sugars together  until smooth and slightly fluffy. mix in the egg and vanilla until fully combined. in a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt. fold the dry ingredients into the wet just until combined.  chop some of the oreos into small chunks ( leave some for topping ) and fold them in along with the white chocolate. scoop the dough into 8 portions, flatten and add an oreo inside and chocolate then shape into tall mounds. ( i flatten the top but keep them tall ) bake at 375°F for 11–14 minutes, until the edges are set and the centers are still soft. ( baking time may vary ) let cool to set the cookies!  i added moser roths white chocolate to the bottom & inside !    #oreo #cookies #chocolatechipcookies #Recipe #baking

Strawberry Nutella Brownies 🍫💌🍓 So fudgy & perfect for valentines!  (Recipe makes an 8x8 pan) Ingredients: 10 tbsp (140g) unsalted butter, melted 1 cup (200g) granulated sugar ¼ cup (50g) brown sugar, packed  2 eggs, room temp 1 tsp vanilla extract ½ cup + 2 tbsp (56g) unsweetened cocoa powder ½ tsp salt 1 tbsp (13g) vegetable oil ½ cup (63g) all purpose flour, spooned & leveled or weighed (don’t pack it in) ¾ cup chocolate chips/ chunks 190g (~⅔ cup) Nutella  Topping: strawberry slices, patted dry (as many as you want/enough to cover the top) Nutella (to spread over the top and drizzle)  *if the nutella is too thick to drizzle you can melt it slightly in the microwave Instructions: Line an 8x8 pan with parchment paper. Spread the nutella onto the parchment into a thin, even square the size of the pan. Freeze for at least 20-30 minutes. Preheat oven to 325°F (163°C) and line/grease an 8x8-inch pan with parchment. In a large bowl, whisk melted butter, granulated sugar, and brown sugar until smooth. Add eggs and vanilla, then whisk vigorously for 1-2 minutes to help create a crackly top. Stir in cocoa powder and salt until fully combined. Mix in oil, then gently fold in the flour until just combined (don’t over mix). Fold in chocolate chips/chopped chocolate. Spread half the batter into the greased pan. Place the frozen nutella sheet on top of it. Then, spread the remaining batter over it to cover the nutella layer completely. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick near the center comes out with no wet batter. It should just come out with a little nutella & slightly moist crumbs. Let the brownies cool completely. Spread a thin layer of nutella over the cooled brownies, add the strawberry slices (patted dry) all over the top, and drizzle with more nutella.  Best enjoyed fresh!   #bakingrecipe #fudgybrownies #chocolatestrawberries #nutella #Recipe

This routine is for anyone who is not dealing with extreme damage but wants over all glossier & softer hair this is the the exact routine I built for getting glass hair on fine hair but will work for the wavy curly hair girls too!!  the science: the flatten your cuticle lies, the more light it reflects that's what gives the illusion of glass. glossy hair isn't a product, it's the consistency of routine over time that’s keeping that cuticle smooth from prewash to final styling  it took me a while to figure out the system, but once I did, the results compounded and now I wanna share my favourite tips with you because this is the routine that actually for every  wash day. the 5 things I never skip: 1. always create a barrier before shampoo: hair oil or conditioner first. less friction = less cuticle damage = more shine 2. weekly hair mask. deep hydration is what keeps that cuticle flat and the shine consistent. 3. a glossing treatment every 3-4 weeks  this is the step that takes glossy to glass  4. leave-in conditioner every single wash. beats frizz and keeps the cuticle flat between washes. 5. the hair sandwich method oil before heat styling AND after. then always finish with a cool shot to lock the cuticle in place ✨ Hope these haircare tips help you guys!! #hair #haircare #glasshair #hairgloss

As promised, this is my current scalp care routine! I previously didn’t think additional scalp care would do much for me, but the research behind the Pantene Abundant & Strong system (and all the research I’ve found on other scalp ingredients / products since) really changed my mind. Now I think about my scalp care routine as a proactive routine to keep my scalp + new hair growth in the healthiest state possible. So fluffy & delicious!🤎 Recipe below👇🏼  🍩 Ingredients Dough: * 300g strong white bread flour * 30g caster sugar * 1/2 tsp salt * 7g fast-action yeast * 2 eggs * 75ml warm milk * 50g melted butter Chocolate Pastry Cream: * 540g whole milk * 2 tsp vanilla extract * 18g cocoa powder * 2 eggs * 2 egg yolks * 100g brown sugar * 25g cornstarch * ¼ tsp sea salt * 170g milk chocolate, chopped * 30g butter 🧾Instructions 1. Make the Dough Mix flour, sugar, salt, and yeast in a bowl. Add eggs, warm milk, and melted butter. Knead until elastic by hand or in mixer. Cover and let rise for 1 hour. 2. Shape & Proof Punch down the dough and divide into 65g portions. Roll each piece into a smooth ball and place onto individual squares of baking paper. Arrange on a tray, cover loosely, and let rise for another hour.  3. Make Chocolate Cream Heat milk and vanilla until steaming. In a bowl, whisk cocoa, eggs, yolks, sugar, cornstarch, and salt. Slowly add the hot milk while whisking constantly, then return to pan and cook until thick & bubbling. Off heat, stir in chocolate and butter. Chill with plastic wrap touching the surface. 4. Fry the Donuts Fry donuts in hot oil. Fry until golden. Drain and roll in sugar. 5. Fill Transfer the chilled chocolate pastry cream to a piping bag fitted with a round nozzle. Poke a small hole in the side of each donut and pipe in the filling generously. double chocolate dipped strawberry banana bread muffins, perfect for valentines🤎    recipe:   ingredients 3 ripe bananas ½ cup neutral oil (110 g) ¾ cup granulated sugar (150 g) ¼ cup brown sugar (55 g) 2 large eggs rt  ¼ cup sour cream or greek yogurt (60 g) 1 tsp vanilla (5 g) 2 cups all-purpose flour (240 g) ½ cup cocoa powder (45 g) 1¼ tsp baking soda (6 g) ½ tsp salt (3 g) ½ tsp instant coffee  dark chocolate chips or chunks 6-7 strawberries chopped  instructions preheat the oven to 425°F and line a muffin tin. in a large bowl, whisk together the mashed bananas, oil, sugars, eggs, sour cream, and vanilla until smooth and glossy. in a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, instant coffee, and salt. fold the dry ingredients into the wet just until combined, then gently fold in the chocolate and strawberries  fill the muffin liners almost all the way to the top. top with strawberries and chocolate & bake at 425°F for 5 minutes, then without opening the oven door, reduce the temperature to 350°F and continue baking for 14–17 minutes, until the tops are domed and a toothpick comes out with moist crumbs. let cool a bit before transferring to a cooling rack. #chocolate #strawberry #bananabread #muffins #Recipe

Recipe 👩🏻‍🍳 75g butter  65g brown sugar 30g granulated sugar 1 egg  100g all purpose flour  1/4tsp bicarbonate soda  1/8tsp baking powder 120g chopped chocolate  Instructions ✨ ~ Melt the butter  ~ Add the granulated and brown sugar to the melted butter and stir until the sugars have dissolved  ~ Add the egg and mix  ~ Add the baking powder, bicarbonate soda and flour and combine until smooth ~ Fold in the chocolate chunks  ~ Put half of the cookie dough in a dish, then add 2 tablespoons of chocolate spread  ~ Add the rest of the dough ontop  ~ Bake at 180 degrees (gas mark 4) for 10 minutes then 160 degrees (gas mark 3) for 5 minutes  ~ Allow it to cool before serving  ~Enjoy! #bake #baking #BakeWithMe #cookie #cookies #skilletcookie #dessert #chocolate #bakewithme #fyp #fypシ #fypage #fypppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppp
